mapper.sql: ID AS id, NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd, TITLE AS title, MOVE_URI AS moveUri, FILE_ID AS fileId, GESI_YN AS gesiYn, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPD_USER AS updUser, UPD_TM AS updTm, DEL_YN AS delYn
mapper.select:
/* com.shop.mapper.Notice.selectNoticeById */ SELECT
FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: /* com.shop.mapper.Notice.updateNotice */ UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, MOVE_URI = #{moveUri}, GESI_YN = #{gesiYn}, UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
/* com.shop.mapper.Notice.deleteNotice */ UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET DEL_YN = 'Y', UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.Notice.selectStickerInfo */ SELECT ID AS id, NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd, TITLE AS title, UPD_USER AS updUser FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd} AND PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1

/* com.shop.mapper.Notice.selectPopupNoticeMngList */ SELECT ID AS id, NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd, PARTNER_ID AS partnerId, TITLE AS title, FILE_ID AS fileId, MOVE_URI AS moveUri, GESI_YN AS gesiYn, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPD_USER AS updUser, UPD_TM AS updTm FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND NOTICE_CD = '1' AND PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} ORDER BY ID DESC

/* com.shop.mapper.Notice.selectPopupNoticeById */ SELECT ID AS id, NOTICE_CD AS noticeCd, PARTNER_ID AS partnerId, TITLE AS title, FILE_ID AS fileId, MOVE_URI AS moveUri, GESI_YN AS gesiYn, CRE_USER AS creUser, CRE_TM AS creTm, UPD_USER AS updUser, UPD_TM AS updTm FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: /* com.shop.mapper.Notice.updatePopupNotice */ UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, FILE_ID = #{fileId}, MOVE_URI = #{moveUri}, GESI_YN = #{gesiYn}, UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.Notice.selectActivePopupNoticeList */ SELECT N.ID AS id, N.TITLE AS title, N.FILE_ID AS fileId, N.MOVE_URI AS moveUri, F.SYS_FILE_NM AS sysFileNm FROM TB_NOTICE N LEFT JOIN TB_FILE_DET F ON F.FILE_ID = N.FILE_ID AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE N.DEL_YN = 'N' AND N.NOTICE_CD = '1' AND N.GESI_YN = 'Y' AND N.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} ORDER BY N.ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET UPD_USER = #{updUser}, UPD_TM = NOW() WHERE ID = ( SELECT ID FROM ( SELECT ID FROM TB_NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_CD = #{noticeCd} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS subquery )
